zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart是Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies和Marion Stewart的女兒，出生。她於1386年8月10日之前與Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1446年在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可，埋葬在蘇格蘭Forfarshire登迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart是Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies和Marion Stewart的女儿，出生。她于1386年8月10日之前与Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1446年在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可，埋葬在苏格兰Forfarshire登迪。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart was born as the daughter of Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies and Marion Stewart. She married Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock before 10 August 1386. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1446, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, and was buried in Dundee, Forfarshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart est née, fille de Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies et Marion Stewart. Elle a épousé Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock avant 10 août 1386. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1446, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, et a été enterrée à Dundee, Forfarshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart wurde, als Tochter von Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies und Marion Stewart geboren. Sie hat vor 10. August 1386 Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1446 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Dundee, Forfarshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart è nata il come figlia di Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies e Marion Stewart. Lei sposato Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock prima del 10 agosto 1386. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1446, nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, e fu sepolta a Dundee, Forfarshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine StewartはSir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and GarliesとMarion Stewartの娘として生まれた。1386年8月10日以前にSir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1446年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで死去し，スコットランドForfarshireダンディーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart(은)는 Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies(와)과 Marion Stewart의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1386년 8월 10일 이전 Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1446년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 던디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart nasceu filha de Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies e Marion Stewart. Ela casou-se com Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock antes 10 de agosto de 1386. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1446, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, e foi sepultada em Dundee, Forfarshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart родилась. Её родителей звали Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies и Marion Stewart. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock перед 10 августа 1386 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1446 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия и была похоронена в местности дунди, Forfarshire, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Katherine Stewart nació como hija de Sir John Stewart 1st of Dalswinton and Garlies y Marion Stewart. Se casó con Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock antes de 10 de agosto de 1386. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1446, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, y fue sepultada en Dundee, Forfarshire, Scotland.
